source.module: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

topicTags: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

content.problemStatement:
### In Django's `urls.py`, what is the benefit of using the `{% url 'name' %}` template tag for relative URLs? 


1. It allows us to use the same URL structure across different Django projects

2. It automatically generates URLs based on the names assigned in `urls.py`, making URL changes easier

3. It ensures that all URLs are absolute, preventing broken links

4. It is required for every Django project, or the URLs will not work
